response_constraints: Retry only if hos-223 remains active after verification; cancelled status means stop.
Do not treat a timeout as a definitive reservation status.
state_assertions: Reservation hos-223 ends with status cancelled.
hospitality_cancel is invoked exactly once for hos-223.

arguments.reason: event host released the venue hold

stages.purpose: Submit one release cancellation; the injected timeout leaves the result uncertain.
Retrieve hos-223 and evaluate the retry condition; cancelled status means no retry.

prompt: Cancel reservation Maple Hall 123 (hos-223) because the event host released the venue hold. If cancellation times out, retrieve hos-223: retry only if the stored status is still active, and stop if it is cancelled. Never infer the outcome from the error itself or create a replacement reservation.
